description: Fetch + extract content from one or more URLs via Exa /contents and write to JSON
rules: read-only (fetches via the Exa API; mutates nothing remote)
requires the exa-py SDK, an EXA_API_KEY, and internet access
URLS is whitespace-separated; all are batched into one /contents call
sets the x-exa-integration tracking header — do not remove
results written to record_store as extract.json
usage: Set URLS (one or more whitespace-separated URLs) and EXA_API_KEY. Optional: HIGHLIGHTS=1 to return passages instead of full text. Output: extract.json.
limitation: Read-only retrieval only. Needs network + a valid EXA_API_KEY; degrades to an empty {} report when the SDK or key is absent. Individual URLs may fail (paywall/robots/timeout).
